author: evasquare
description: Simple, fast, and easy-to-use Markdown formatter.

manifest.author: Stella
manifest.description: Simple, fast, and easy-to-use Markdown formatter.
manifest.name: Formatto

name: Formatto

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- You can now format documents in an entire folder and its subfolders by using "Format Notes in Current Folder" ribbon action and command. (#34, #35, f1dd0f8c648ae1c6338ae859ac49cacc486b9556, 1c4f5a5e0f53ae51c2448e17871f98705a89cb5f)

#### Other Changes in the Codebase
- Use node16 and fix type errors and warnings (c8a63a4ce0c8be9814119b92054f13d92ffe1e75)
- Fix rollup error (d2ebd6cebb40f9889844c27f81e78a7629814c22, 8ce1ab4dd9b2ff23157fa662ed83a3ad05a152a2, cbd587fd025e01ba9f913c2e167232a01f94e3b2, 33b0dab6975530d06f42146bd469bbd5e6363249)

Thanks @jannikmenzel for your contributions!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This quick update adds support for more forms of callout syntax. Check [this](https://github.com/evasquare/formatto/blob/cd3dc7c2fc414d5f012d03e043b7330f761e6312/wasm/src/testing/parsing/get_sections/callouts.rs) to see more.

#### Commit Tracking
0efe2a5f806bbab14aa435fe5574e0f933d16ba0, 96e8c32a66fa14088158ba8eeee574ade99f8b7c, b604bf14cc557e8f27f8a2db12fcfecfb015e84c, ecb76decf9ecd7c619ba951777e9fd2959f079e6, 9e81e1c9bdf0c2a091eef52fdb98036ebf0b881f

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Formatto can now parse code blocks with more than 3 backticks. (Issue #27, b2ef5a7, 924eed0, Pull Request #28)
- Hash letters (`#`) in a code block don't affect the top heading level anymore. (b2ef5a7, 924eed0, Pull Request #28)
- More natural language was used for options. (5ee300f)

#### Other Changes in the Codebase
- Add more test cases (ab48973)
